status_taxonomy.marketplace-local-validation: Generated marketplace files pass local export validation; runtime/manual evidence is tracked separately.
status_taxonomy.manual-evidence-required: Generated artifacts are present, but publish-ready status requires explicit validation evidence.
status_taxonomy.experimental: Documented but not release-gated for supported public use.
status_taxonomy.withheld: Generated artifacts are not published or public support is intentionally withheld.
status_taxonomy.pre-validation: Generated artifacts are present, but public install support is withheld until install-smoke validation promotes the status.
status_taxonomy.install-supported: Reserved for a later milestone with safe installer entrypoints and install-smoke evidence.
status_taxonomy.supported: Reserved for a later milestone with runtime validation evidence.
